workflow.name: OpenSearch HA existing
workflow.description: Bootstrap and validate OpenSearch HA from an existing automation runner and target inventory.

data.label: Prepare OpenSearch inventory
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
apt-get update
DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y ansible sshpass
cat >/tmp/opensearch-inventory.ini <<'INVENTORY'
[opensearch]
10.31.94.11 role=opensearch name=opensearch-01
10.31.94.12 role=opensearch name=opensearch-02
10.31.94.13 role=opensearch name=opensearch-03
INVENTORY

data.label: Install OpenSearch container runtime
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/opensearch-runtime.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
- hosts: opensearch
  become: true
  tasks:
    - ansible.builtin.shell: |
        if command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          docker --version
          exit 0
        fi
        if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          apt-get update
          DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y docker.io docker-compose-plugin
        elif command -v dnf >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          dnf install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
        elif command -v yum >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          yum install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
        fi
        systemctl enable --now docker
PLAYBOOK
ansible-playbook -i /tmp/opensearch-inventory.ini /tmp/opensearch-runtime.yml

data.label: Render OpenSearch cluster manifests
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/opensearch-deploy.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
- hosts: opensearch
  become: true
  tasks:
    - ansible.builtin.file:
        path: /opt/octastack/opensearch
        state: directory
        mode: "0750"
    - ansible.builtin.copy:
        dest: /opt/octastack/opensearch/compose.yml
        mode: "0640"
        content: |
          services:
            opensearch:
              image: opensearchproject/opensearch:2.17.0
              container_name: octastack-opensearch
              restart: unless-stopped
              environment:
                discovery_type: "single-node"
                OPENSEARCH_INITIAL_ADMIN_PASSWORD: "ChangeMe123!"
              ports:
                - "9200:9200"
                - "9600:9600"
              volumes:
                - data:/usr/share/opensearch/data
          volumes:
            data: {}
PLAYBOOK

data.label: Deploy OpenSearch cluster
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >>/tmp/opensearch-deploy.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/opensearch/compose.yml pull
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/opensearch/compose.yml up -d
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/opensearch/compose.yml ps
PLAYBOOK
ansible-playbook -i /tmp/opensearch-inventory.ini /tmp/opensearch-deploy.yml

data.label: Document OpenSearch topology
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/opensearch-topology.md <<'EOF'
# OpenSearch HA topology

Members:
- opensearch-01: 10.31.94.11 (opensearch)
- opensearch-02: 10.31.94.12 (opensearch)
- opensearch-03: 10.31.94.13 (opensearch)

This example deploys one OpenSearch container per member host. Replace the placeholder commands with vendor-supported clustering, TLS, backup, and failover automation before production use.
EOF
cat /tmp/opensearch-topology.md

data.label: Validate OpenSearch cluster
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
ansible -i /tmp/opensearch-inventory.ini opensearch -b -m shell -a 'docker ps --format "{{.Names}} {{.Status}}"'
